body: i just spoke with Nicole from the glass company. she told me that the gold hardware is backordered, and will need to push the install date
she had previously agreed with you to install this Friday, but it will have to be pushed for next Monday 12th
still pending the shipment of the parts
Good morning Audrey!
i got confirmation that all parts arrived
they can install Monday 8/12, between 8 and 10 am
would this time be good for you ?
Yes
Perfect
we are close to the finish line!
Yes thank you for your help
Good morninng Audrey!
i just got an text message from the glass door team leader that they wont be able to install today
and to reschedule for tomorrow
im really sorry for this, its not my expectation that they cancel/reschedule last minute
they still havent given me a reason for the reschedule, but wanted to let you know asap
first, if its possible for you, and secondly, to apologize and try to minimize your time lose
loss*
Ok we can reschedule for tomorrow
thank you for your understanding
tomorrow, same time
Yes
perfect. thanks!
its scheduled
Ok

thank you!
Welcome
Hi Carlos we are having a leaking problem from the shower door,b7g puddles of water are forming on the floor when showering please advise
would it be possible to get a picture of the puddles ? it will make it easier to diagnose
i will need to call the company that install it and explain whats happening (thats why i need to understand myself)
I'll try to send a picture,but I believe it's coming from the need some kind of guard

you believe its come from ? the glass door i assume. 
from the railing in the bottom? or in between the 2 sliding doors ?
From the bottom of the door ,there is no sliding door
Morning! sorry, you are right, yours is pivoting
Working on getting a repair visit from the team
will let you know the proposed date
Ok
Hi Carlos ,haven't heard about shower door leak?
